sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, prob. to be straight, level; compare the kindred שָׂדָה. Arab. سَدَّ Conj. I. IV. to tend straight to the mark; II. to lead straight. Conj. X. to be straight; سَدِيدُ one who goes straight to the mark.

Piel, to harrow, i.e. to level [smooth down the furrows of] a field, Isa 28:24 Job 39:10 Hos 10:11.

Derivative, pr.n. שִׂדִּים.
